Exam Name Education Qualification
 

Bihar CET B.Ed

  • To be eligible for the B.Ed. Programme, candidates must have secured at least 50% marks in their Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in fields like Science, Social Science, Humanities, or Commerce. Those with a Bachelor’s degree in Engineering or Technology, specializing in Science or Mathematics, must have a minimum of 55% marks. Equivalent qualifications are also accepted.

  • For the Shiksha Shastri (B.Ed. in Sanskrit) course, candidates must have 50% marks in a Bachelor’s degree with Sanskrit as the main subject and a Master’s degree in Sanskrit or Acharya in traditional Sanskrit Shastra. Alternatively, those who have passed Shastri (B.A. including Sanskrit) with 50% marks and have completed a 2-year Acharya (MA Sanskrit) course must also pass a Bridge Course. However, marks from the first year of Acharya/MA will not be considered in the final percentage calculation.

 RRB Group D Various Posts in Level 1 2026 While Form Filling Document Required 
Documents Name Details
Photo & Signature
  • The candidate’s photograph must be a recent passport-size photo with a light or white background. The face should be clearly visible, and the candidate must not wear a cap, goggles, or mask.
  • The signature must be done using black ink on white paper and should be clear and easily readable.
Aadhaar Card
  • The Aadhaar number is required at the time of form filling, and the original Aadhaar card must be produced during PET and document verification.
10th Class Marksheet
  • This document is used as proof of Date of Birth and educational qualification.
Caste / Category Certificates (If Applicable)
  • Candidates must possess a valid SC/ST certificate, OBC (Non-Creamy Layer) certificate, or EWS certificate of the latest financial year, as applicable. The certificate must be issued in the government-prescribed format.
PwBD / Disability Certificate (If Applicable)
  • Candidates must have a Benchmark Disability Certificate issued by an authorized medical board, with the disability percentage clearly mentioned.
Ex-Serviceman Certificate (If Applicable)
  • Candidates must possess a valid Discharge Book or Service Certificate, in which the length of service is clearly mentioned.
Bank Account Details
  • Candidates must provide the account holder’s name, account number, and IFSC code, which are required for fee refund or future payments.
Domicile / Address Proof (If Asked)
  • Candidates may need to provide a state domicile certificate along with their permanent and correspondence address details, if required.
Other Useful Documents
  • Candidates must keep an active email ID and mobile number, along with the application/confirmation page printout and fee payment receipt, for future reference.
  • Candidates must Keep all documents scanned and ready before form filling. Fill name, DOB, and parents’ names exactly as per 10th marksheet. Incorrect or fake documents can cancel selection. Carry originals with self-attested photocopies for verification.

Post Name Eligibility Criteria
Airforce Agniveer Vayu Musician (Intake 01/2027)

  • Candidates must have passed 10th (Matriculation) with minimum passing marks from a recognized school or board. They should have good musical ability, including correct tempo, pitch, and the ability to sing a full song, perform a tune, use any music notation system, and play at least one instrument. Candidates must also meet musical experience criteria, such as Grade 5 or higher from a recognized music institute, a diploma in Hindustani or Carnatic music, or certificates/awards from music events.  Agniveer Vayu Musician 01/2027 :- Mandatory Medical Standards 

​The mandatory medical standards for candidates applying to the Agniveer Vayu Musician 01/2026 position are as follows:​

Height Requirements:

  • Male Candidates: Minimum acceptable height is 162 cm. ​

  • Female Candidates: Minimum acceptable height is 152 cm. For candidates from North East or hilly regions of Uttarakhand, a lower minimum height of 147 cm is acceptable. For candidates from Lakshadweep, the minimum height is 150 cm. ​

Chest Measurements:

  • Male Candidates: Chest should be well-proportioned and well-developed, with a minimum circumference of 77 cm and a minimum expansion of 5 cm. 

  • Female Candidates: Chest should be well-proportioned and well-developed, with a minimum expansion of 5 cm. ​

Hearing Ability:

  • Candidates should have normal hearing, able to hear a forced whisper from a distance of 6 meters by each ear separately. ​

General Health:

  • Candidates should be physically and mentally fit to perform duties in any part of the world, in any climate and terrain. They must be free from any active or latent, acute or chronic, medical or surgical disability or communicable disease, infection, and skin ailments. ​

UTET Examination 2026 : Exam Details
Post Name Eligibility Criteria
Class 1st to 5th (Primary Class)
  • Candidates must have passed 10+2 (Intermediate) with at least 50% marks and a 2-year Diploma in Elementary Education (D.El.Ed./BTC), or 45% marks with D.El.Ed./BTC as per NCTE 2002 Regulations, or 50% marks with a 4-year Bachelor of Elementary Education (B.El.Ed.), or 50% marks with a 2-year Diploma in Special Education recognized by the Rehabilitation Council of India (RCI). Alternatively, candidates with a Bachelor’s degree and a 2-year Diploma in Elementary Education (D.El.Ed./BTC) are also eligible.
Class 6th to 8th (Elementary Class)
  • Candidates must have a Bachelor’s degree with D.El.Ed./BTC, B.Ed., B.Ed. (Special Education), or an equivalent teacher education qualification as prescribed by NCTE. Alternatively, candidates with 10+2 and a 4-year B.El.Ed./B.A.B.Ed./B.Sc.B.Ed. are also eligible. Regularly appointed in-service teachers are also eligible as per the notification.

  • Candidates must have a 4-year Bachelor’s degree in Agriculture, Horticulture, Animal Husbandry, Veterinary Science, Dairy Science, Fishery Science, Pisciculture, Agricultural Marketing & Cooperation, Cooperation & Banking, Agro-Forestry, Forestry, Agricultural Biotechnology, B.Tech. Biotechnology, Food Science, Agriculture Business Management, Food Technology, Dairy Technology, Agricultural Engineering, Sericulture, or Fisheries Engineering from a recognized university or institution.

  • Candidates must have a Postgraduate degree in Hindi with English as a subject at the graduation level, or a Postgraduate degree in Sanskrit with both Hindi and English as subjects at the graduation level from a recognized university.
Law Officer
(Scale I)		 105
  • Candidates must have a Bachelor’s degree in Law (LL.B.) from a recognized university and be enrolled as an Advocate with the Bar Council.

  • Candidates must have a Graduation degree along with a full-time 2-year Postgraduate Degree or Postgraduate Diploma in Personnel Management, Industrial Relations, Human Resources (HR), Human Resource Development (HRD), Social Work, or Labour Law from a recognized university or institution.
Marketing Officer (Scale I) 00
  • Candidates must have a Graduation degree along with a full-time 2-year MMS (Marketing), MBA (Marketing), or PGDBA/PGDBM/PGPM/PGDM with specialization in Marketing from a recognized university or institution.

  • Question: What details are mentioned on the MPESB ADDET Admit Card 2026?
  • Answer: The admit card generally contains the candidate’s name, roll number, application number, photograph, exam date, exam time, examination centre, reporting time, and important exam instructions.
  • Question: Is it mandatory to carry the MPESB ADDET Admit Card to the examination centre?
  • Answer: Yes. Candidates must carry a printed copy of the admit card along with a valid original photo ID proof. Entry to the examination centre will not be allowed without these documents.
